message.content:
@startuml
actor actorName as actor1

box "Manage-Data-Exchanges" #lightblue
participant CLI
participant Web
participant adc
end box

actor actorName as actor2

actor1 -> CLI : adc-global-create()
CLI -> adc : global/create()
actor1 -> CLI : global/create()
CLI --> adc : global/create()

@enduml
